title: tetraria urvilleana
intro: Tetraria urvilleana, also known as the dwarf spearwort or reed spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tetraria urvilleana include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, and alleviating respiratory problems like bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Tetraria urvilleana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by boiling the leaves and stems in water or steeping them in a solvent.
